overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City. The player moves along a sidewalk past a fuel station, through a major intersection with towering futuristic skyscrapers, and continues down a city street with elevated highways and neon signage visible under bright daylight.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk adjacent to fuel station

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk next to a fuel station, passing digital billboards and elevated rail structures

notable_agents.action: male pedestrian walking in same direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall digital sign displaying fuel prices with green 'FUEL' text at top
large digital advertisement screen with distinctive orange structural frame
futuristic elevated monorail tracks running overhead with curved support beams
tall futuristic skyscraper with geometric black and white facade patterns

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered city sidewalk next to a fuel station with prominent price signage. The player walks forward beneath elevated rail tracks, passing a large orange-framed digital billboard. Sparse pedestrians share the walkway while futuristic architecture rises in the background under partial cloud cover.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection approach with elevated highway overpass

events.description: exits covered walkway area and passes under massive elevated highway structure
futuristic sedan drives past on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk while approaching a major intersection, passing under heavy infrastructure

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving along the multi-lane road

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel elevated highway with thick support columns
large building with distinctive central archway and steam vents at base
tall dark cylindrical tower with horizontal ring structures and lighting

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the covered area into an open intersection approach dominated by a massive highway overpass. The archway building becomes visible in the distance with steam rising from its base. Traffic moves along the multi-lane road as the player passes under the heavy concrete infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with towering skyscrapers and flying vehicle traffic

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at flying vehicles and tops of skyscrapers
elderly pedestrian with white hair crosses the street from right to left

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection while looking up at the sky to observe flying vehicles between skyscrapers

notable_agents.action: elderly woman with white hair and cane carefully crossing the street

entered.detail: futuristic flying cars and drones visible in the sky between buildings
tall pole with multiple traffic lights and street signs attached

segments.scene_description: At the intersection, the player looks up to reveal flying vehicles navigating between massive skyscrapers. The cylindrical tower looms large on the right while the player crosses the asphalt. An elderly pedestrian crosses nearby as various futuristic cars drive through the intersection under the bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with commercial buildings and parked vehicles

events.description: passing the 66th building sign and entering a new street section with different architecture

agents.ego_description: walking down the sidewalk past commercial buildings, observing street traffic and parked vehicles

entered.detail: large building with illuminated '66th' signage on dark facade
low-rise industrial structure with pipes and ventilation equipment
traffic pole with green street name signs and signal lights

segments.scene_description: The player continues down the city street past the building marked '66th' on the left. The architecture shifts to include industrial buildings on the right with parked vans and moving traffic. Street signs and lamps line the sidewalk as the walk continues through the commercial district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered urban walkway into the expansive, sun-drenched heart of a futuristic metropolis. It begins on a covered sidewalk beside a fuel station, moving beneath elevated rail tracks and past a large orange digital billboard. As the camera emerges from the shade, the environment opens into a wide intersection dominated by a massive concrete highway overpass and a distant archway building emitting plumes of steam. The perspective then tilts upward to reveal flying vehicles weaving between towering skyscrapers and a massive cylindrical tower before crossing the asphalt under the bright midday sun. Finally, the scene shifts toward a commercial district, passing the 66th street marker and moving alongside industrial buildings and parked vans as the walk continues down the city street.
